31468.zh_abstract: 利用1840-1852年间美国电报网络增长的新数字化数据，本文研究了电报对全国选举的影响。我利用与华盛顿有电报联系的日报的邻近性，来生成获取来自华盛顿的电报新闻的外生性差异。我发现，获取华盛顿新闻的延迟时间更短，对全国选举的选民投票率产生了稳健的正向影响。关于机制，我提供了证据表明报纸促进了全国新闻向地方区域的传播。此外，对19世纪40年代一百多家小镇周报的文本分析表明，获取华盛顿新闻的改善导致报纸报道了更多的全国政治新闻，包括对国会、总统以及涉及奴隶制的地区分歧的报道。结果表明，电报使报纸不再那么狭隘，促进了全国性的对话，并增加了政治参与。我几乎没有发现证据表明，获取来自华盛顿的电报新闻影响了政党得票率或国会议员的唱名表决。
31468.meta: Programs：DAE, POL；JEL：D72, L82, L96, N41, N71, O3

31467.title: Corporate Tax Disclosure
31467.authors: Jeffrey L. Hoopes, Leslie Robinson, Joel Slemrod
31467.abstract: Policies that require, or recommend, disclosure of corporate tax information are becoming more common throughout the world, as are examples of tax-related information increasingly influencing public policy and perceptions. In addition, companies are increasing the voluntary provision of tax-related information. We describe those trends and place them within a taxonomy of public and private tax disclosure. We then review the academic literature on corporate tax disclosures and discuss what is known about their effects. One key takeaway is the paucity of evidence that many tax disclosures mandated with the aim of increasing tax revenue have produced additional revenue. We highlight many crucial unanswered questions, answers to which would inform future tax legislation and financial accounting rule making.
31467.zh_abstract: 要求或建议披露企业税收信息的政策在全球范围内日益普遍，同时，税收相关信息越来越多地影响公共政策和公众认知的例子也在增加。此外，企业正在增加税收相关信息的自愿提供。我们描述了这些趋势，并将其置于公共和私人税收披露的分类框架中。然后，我们回顾了关于企业税收披露的学术文献，并讨论了已知的其影响。一个关键结论是，很少有证据表明许多旨在增加税收收入的强制性税收披露产生了额外收入。我们强调了许多关键但尚未解答的问题，对这些问题的解答将为未来的税收立法和财务会计规则制定提供信息。

31466.title: The Job Ladder: Inflation vs. Reallocation
31466.zh_title: 工作阶梯：通货膨胀与重新配置
31466.abstract: We introduce on-the-job search frictions in an otherwise standard monetary DSGE New-Keynesian model. Heterogeneity in productivity across jobs gives rise to a job ladder. Firms Bertrand-compete for employed workers according to the Sequential Auctions protocol of Postel-Vinay and Robin (2002). Outside job offers to employed workers, when accepted, reallocate employment up the productivity ladder; when declined, because matched by the current employer, they raise production costs and, due to nominal price rigidities, compress mark-ups, building inflationary pressure. When employment is concentrated at the bottom of the job ladder, typically after recessions, the reallocation effect prevails, aggregate supply expands, moderating marginal costs and inflation. As workers climb the job ladder, reducing slack in the employment pool, the inflation effect takes over. The model generates endogenous cyclical movements in the Neo Classical labor wedge and in the New Keynesian wage mark-up. The economy takes time to absorb cyclical misallocation and features propagation in the response of job creation, unemployment and inflation to aggregate shocks. The ratio between job-finding probabilities from job-to-job and from unemployment, a measure of the “Acceptance rate” of job offers to employed workers, predicts negatively inflation, independently of the unemployment rate.
31466.zh_abstract: 我们在一个原本标准的货币DSGE新凯恩斯模型中引入了在职搜寻摩擦。工作间生产率的异质性产生了工作阶梯。企业根据Postel-Vinay和Robin（2002）的顺序拍卖协议，对在职工人进行伯特兰竞争。对在职工人的外部工作邀请，如果被接受，会将就业重新配置到生产率阶梯的上层；如果被拒绝（因为被当前雇主匹配），则会提高生产成本，并且由于名义价格刚性，会压缩加成率，从而形成通胀压力。当就业集中在工作阶梯的底部时（通常在经济衰退之后），重新配置效应占主导地位，总供给扩张，从而缓和边际成本和通货膨胀。随着工人攀登工作阶梯，减少了就业池中的闲置，通胀效应开始占据主导地位。该模型产生了新古典劳动楔子和新凯恩斯工资加成率的内生周期性波动。经济需要时间来吸收周期性的错配，并且在就业创造、失业和通货膨胀对总体冲击的反应中表现出传导机制。从工作到工作以及从失业到工作的求职概率之比，即对在职工人工作邀请的“接受率”的衡量指标，能够负向预测通货膨胀，且独立于失业率。

31465.title: The Linear Algebra of Economic Geography Models
31465.zh_title: 经济地理模型的线性代数
31465.authors: Benny Kleinman, Ernest Liu, Stephen J. Redding
31465.abstract: We provide sufficient statistics for nominal and real wage exposure to productivity shocks in a constant elasticity economic geography model. These exposure measures summarize the first-order general equilibrium elasticity of nominal and real wages in each location with respect to productivity shocks in all locations. They are readily computed using commonly-available trade data and the values of trade and migration elasticities. They have an intuitive interpretation in terms of underlying economic mechanisms. Computing these measures for all bilateral pairs of locations involves a single matrix inversion and therefore remains computational efficient even with an extremely high-dimensional state space. These sufficient statistics provide theory-consistent measures of locations’ exposure to productivity shocks for use in further economic and statistical analysis.
31465.zh_abstract: 我们为恒定弹性经济地理模型中名义和实际工资对生产率冲击的暴露度提供了充分统计量。这些暴露度衡量指标总结了每个地点的名义和实际工资相对于所有地点生产率冲击的一阶一般均衡弹性。它们可以很容易地使用常见的贸易数据以及贸易和移民弹性值来计算。它们在潜在的经济机制方面具有直观的解释。计算所有双边地点对的这些衡量指标仅涉及一次矩阵求逆，因此即使在极高维度的状态空间下也能保持计算效率。这些充分统计量为在进一步的经济和统计分析中使用提供了理论一致的地点对生产率冲击暴露度的衡量指标。

31464.title: The Credit Supply Channel of Monetary Policy Tightening and its Distributional Impacts
31464.zh_title: 货币政策紧缩的信贷供给渠道及其分配效应
31464.authors: Joshua Bosshardt, Marco Di Maggio, Ali Kakhbod, Amir Kermani
31464.abstract: This paper studies how tightening monetary policy transmits to the economy through the mortgage market and sheds new light on the distributional consequences at both individual and regional levels. We find that credit supply factors, specifically restrictions on the debt-to-income (DTI) ratio, account for most of the decline in mortgages. These effects are even more pronounced for minority and middle-income borrowers, who find themselves excluded from the credit market. Additionally, regions with historically high DTI ratios exhibit greater reductions in mortgage originations, house prices, and consumption.
31464.zh_abstract: 本文研究了紧缩性货币政策如何通过抵押贷款市场传导至经济，并揭示了其在个人和区域层面的分配后果。我们发现，信贷供给因素，特别是对债务收入比（DTI）的限制，解释了抵押贷款下降的大部分原因。这些影响对少数族裔和中等收入借款人更为显著，他们发现自己被排除在信贷市场之外。此外，历史上债务收入比（DTI）较高的地区在抵押贷款发放、房价和消费方面表现出更大的减少。
31464.meta: Programs：CF, ME；JEL：E20, E5, E52, G5, G51

31463.title: Firms with Benefits? Nonwage Compensation and Implications for Firms and Labor Markets
31463.zh_title: 提供福利的企业？非工资补偿及其对企业与劳动力市场的影响
31463.abstract: Using administrative data on health insurance, retirement, and leave benefits, we find within-firm variation accounts for a dramatically lower percentage of total variation in benefits than in wages. We also document sharply higher between-firm variation in nonwage benefits than in wages. We argue that this pattern can be a consequence of nondiscrimination regulations, fairness concerns, and the high administrative burden of managing too many or complex plans. Consistent with this mechanism, we show that the presence of high-wage workers in unrelated divisions of a firm as well as workers hired in high-benefit local labor markets positively predicts their colleagues’ benefits, controlling for occupation, wages, state, and industry. We find that the resulting high benefits reduce turnover, particularly among low-wage workers, for whom the benefits comprise a larger percentage of total compensation. Moreover, firms with more generous benefits attract and retain more high-wage workers, but also reduce their reliance on low-wage workers more than low-benefit peers. Our results suggest that benefits disproportionately matter for worker-firm matching and, hence, compensation inequality.
31463.zh_abstract: 利用关于健康保险、退休和休假福利的行政数据，我们发现，在福利总变异中，企业内变异所占的比例远低于工资。我们还记录了企业间在非工资福利方面的变异远高于工资。我们认为，这种模式可能是非歧视性法规、公平性关切以及管理过多或复杂计划的高行政负担的结果。与这一机制一致，我们表明，在控制了职业、工资、州和行业后，企业不相关部门中高工资工人的存在，以及在高福利地方劳动力市场雇用的工人，会正向预测其同事的福利。我们发现，由此产生的高福利降低了离职率，尤其是在低工资工人中，对他们而言，福利占总薪酬的比例更高。此外，提供更慷慨福利的企业能吸引和留住更多高工资工人，但与低福利同行相比，它们也更多地减少了对低工资工人的依赖。我们的结果表明，福利对工人-企业匹配以及由此产生的薪酬不平等具有不成比例的重要影响。
31463.meta: Programs：CF, LS；JEL：G32, J01, J23, J32, J63

31462.title: Bank Branch Density and Bank Runs
31462.zh_title: 银行网点密度与银行挤兑
31462.authors: Efraim Benmelech, Jun Yang, Michal Zator
31462.abstract: Bank branch density, defined as the number of bank branches to total deposits, has significantly declined over the past decade, fueled by a confluence of branch closings and the almost doubling of deposits between 2016 and 2022. During this period, banks with low branch density benefited from large deposits inflows, leading to even lower density. But the virtuous cycle of deposits growth in these banks stopped spinning when investors became wary about their financial health. Stock prices of banks with low branch density plummeted during the 2023 Banking Crisis as these banks experienced larger outflows of uninsured deposits. Our results suggest that digital banking enabled banks to grow faster and attract uninsured deposits, but those large deposits inflows took the form of “hot money” that changed its course when economic conditions worsened.
31462.zh_abstract: 银行网点密度（定义为银行网点数量与总存款之比）在过去十年中显著下降，这是由于网点关闭与2016年至2022年间存款几乎翻倍共同推动的。在此期间，网点密度低的银行受益于大量存款流入，导致密度进一步降低。但是，当投资者开始担忧这些银行的财务状况时，这些银行存款增长的正向循环停止了。在2023年银行业危机期间，网点密度低的银行股价暴跌，因为这些银行经历了更大的未保险存款外流。我们的结果表明，数字银行使银行能够更快增长并吸引未保险存款，但这些大量存款流入采取了“热钱”的形式，当经济状况恶化时，其流向发生了改变。
31462.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EFG, IFM；JEL：E44, E52, G20, G21, G28

31461.title: Regulating Transformative Technologies
31461.abstract: Transformative technologies like generative artificial intelligence promise to accelerate productivity growth across many sectors, but they also present new risks from potential misuse. We develop a multi-sector technology adoption model to study the optimal regulation of transformative technologies when society can learn about these risks over time. Socially optimal adoption is gradual and convex. If social damages are proportional to the productivity gains from the new technology, a higher growth rate leads to slower optimal adoption. Equilibrium adoption is inefficient when firms do not internalize all social damages, and sector-independent regulation is helpful but generally not sufficient to restore optimality.
31461.zh_abstract: 像生成式人工智能这样的变革性技术有望加速许多部门的生产率增长，但它们也带来了因潜在滥用而产生的新风险。我们开发了一个多部门技术采用模型，以研究当社会能够随时间了解这些风险时，对变革性技术的最优监管。社会最优的采用是渐进且凸性的。如果社会损害与新技术的生产率收益成比例，那么更高的增长率会导致更慢的最优采用。当企业没有内部化所有社会损害时，均衡采用是无效率的，而独立于部门的监管是有帮助的，但通常不足以恢复最优状态。

31460.title: Mega Firms and New Technological Trajectories in the U.S.
31460.zh_title: 美国的大型企业与新技术轨迹
31460.authors: Joonkyu Choi, Serguey Braguinsky, Yuheng Ding, Karam Jo, Seula Kim
31460.abstract: We provide evidence that mega firms have played an increasingly important role in shaping new technological trajectories in recent years. While the share of novel patents—defined as patents introducing new combinations of technological components—produced by mega firms declined until around 2000, it has rebounded sharply since then. Furthermore, we find that the technological impact and knowledge diffusion of novel patents by mega firms have grown relative to those by non-mega firms after 2001. We also explore potential drivers of this trend, presenting evidence that the rise in novel patenting by mega firms is tied to their disproportionate increase in cash holdings and the expansion of their technological scope. Our findings highlight an overlooked positive role of mega firms in the economywide innovation process.
31460.zh_abstract: 我们提供的证据表明，近年来，大型企业在塑造新技术轨迹方面发挥了越来越重要的作用。虽然大型企业生产的创新专利（定义为引入新技术组件组合的专利）的份额在2000年左右之前一直在下降，但此后急剧反弹。此外，我们发现，在2001年之后，大型企业的创新专利的技术影响力和知识扩散相对于非大型企业有所增长。我们还探讨了这一趋势的潜在驱动因素，提供的证据表明，大型企业创新专利的增加与其现金持有量的不成比例增长以及其技术范围的扩大有关。我们的发现强调了大型企业在整个经济创新过程中一个被忽视的积极作用。

31459.title: Globalization and Inequality in Latin America
31459.zh_title: 全球化与拉丁美洲的不平等
31459.abstract: We survey the recent literature studying the effects of globalization on inequality in Latin America. Our focus is on research emerging from the late 2000s onward, with an emphasis on empirical work considering new mechanisms, studying new dimensions of inequality, and developing new methodologies to capture the many facets of globalization's relationship to inequality. After summarizing both design-based and quantitative work in this area, we propose directions for future work. Our overarching recommendation is that researchers develop unifying frameworks to help synthesize the results of individual studies that focus on distinct aspects of globalization's relationship to inequality.
31459.zh_abstract: 我们综述了近期研究全球化对拉丁美洲不平等影响的文献。我们的重点是从2000年代末期至今的研究，尤其关注那些考虑新机制、研究不平等新维度以及开发新方法来捕捉全球化与不平等之间多方面关系的实证工作。在总结了该领域基于设计的研究和定量研究之后，我们提出了未来工作的方向。我们的总体建议是，研究者应开发统一的框架，以帮助综合那些关注全球化与不平等关系不同方面的单项研究结果。
31459.meta: Programs：DEV, ITI, LS；JEL：F14, F62, F66, J0, O10

31458.title: Is the Emphasis on Cofinancing Good for Environmental Multilateral Funds?
31458.zh_title: 强调共同融资对环境多边基金有益吗？
31458.abstract: International environment and development agencies increasingly emphasize external cofinancing when selecting projects to fund. This paper considers whether the emphasis on cofinancing helps promote institutional objectives, or creates perverse and inefficient incentives. We present a model of project selection that can apply to any funding agency, but focus on environmental multilateral funds and climate change. We show that introducing cofinancing objectives to a fund that seeks to maximize its immediate environmental impact is redundant as best, and more likely counterproductive. We test implications of our model using project-level data from two of the leading environmental multilateral funds, the Global Environment Facility (GEF) and the Green Climate Fund (GCF). While tradeoffs exist between emission reductions and cofinancing, we find that they are not strong enough to imply that current cofinancing preferences are diminishing the environmental benefits that funds can claim. However, we also find that the emphasis on cofinancing in project selection is likely to be globally inefficient, as projects with greater cofinancing ratios tend to yield smaller emission reductions per gross dollar spent. This finding should sound a note of caution given the overall scarcity of financial resources available to achieve global climate goals.
31458.zh_abstract: 国际环境和发展机构在选择资助项目时越来越强调外部共同融资。本文考虑了强调共同融资是否有助于促进机构目标，还是会产生反常和低效的激励。我们提出了一个适用于任何资助机构的项目选择模型，但重点关注环境多边基金和气候变化。我们表明，对于一个旨在最大化其直接环境影响的基金来说，引入共同融资目标充其量是多余的，更可能适得其反。我们使用来自两个主要环境多边基金——全球环境基金（GEF）和绿色气候基金（GCF）的项目层面数据来检验我们模型的含义。虽然减排与共同融资之间存在权衡，但我们发现这种权衡并不足以强到意味着当前的共同融资偏好正在削弱基金所能声称的环境效益。然而，我们也发现，项目选择中对共同融资的强调很可能在全球范围内是低效的，因为共同融资比率较高的项目往往每花费一美元总支出所产生的减排量更小。鉴于实现全球气候目标可用的总体财政资源稀缺，这一发现应敲响警钟。

31457.title: Monopsony, Efficiency, and the Regularization of Undocumented Immigrants
31457.zh_title: 买方垄断、效率与无证移民的合法化
31457.abstract: In May 1981, President François Mitterrand regularized the status of undocumented immigrant workers in France. The newly legalized immigrants represented 12 percent of the non-French workforce and about 1 percent of all workers. Employers have monopsony power over undocumented workers because the undocumented may find it costly to participate in the open labor market and have restricted economic opportunities. By alleviating this labor market imperfection, a regularization program can move the market closer to the efficient competitive equilibrium and potentially increase employment and wages for both the newly legalized and the authorized workforce. Our empirical analysis reveals that the Mitterrand regularization program particularly increased employment and wages for low-skill native and immigrant men, and raised French GDP by over 1 percent.
31457.zh_abstract: 1981年5月，法国总统弗朗索瓦·密特朗将无证移民工人的身份合法化。新获得合法身份的移民占非法国劳动力的12%，约占所有工人的1%。雇主对无证工人拥有买方垄断权力，因为无证工人参与公开劳动力市场的成本可能很高，且经济机会受限。通过缓解这种劳动力市场的不完善，合法化计划可以使市场更接近有效的竞争均衡，并可能增加新合法化工人和已授权工人的就业和工资。我们的实证分析表明，密特朗的合法化计划特别增加了低技能本地和移民男性的就业和工资，并使法国GDP提高了超过1%。

31456.title: Credible Social Planning under Uncertainty
31456.zh_title: 不确定性下的可信社会规划
31456.abstract: Economists have long studied policy choice by a social planner who aims to maximize welfare in democracies or other political systems where, in some sense, welfare is intended to express the well-being of a society rather than the personal preferences of a dictator. The motivation for studying planning is most transparent when actual planners face specific decision problems. Welfare economics has also sought to shed light on noncooperative societal decision processes, where no actual planner exists. Researchers have generally assumed that the actual or hypothetical planner knows enough about the choice environment to be able to determine an optimal action. However, the consequences of decisions are often highly uncertain. Addressing the failure of research to come to grips with uncertainty has motivated my program of study of credible social planning under uncertainty. This paper describes the main themes and summarizes several applications. I first discuss practices that have promoted planning with incredible certitude, using specific cases to illustrate. I next describe and contrast the conceptions of uncertainty in consequentialist and axiomatic decision theory. I then summarize my studies of five problems of planning under uncertainty.
31456.zh_abstract: 经济学家长期以来研究社会规划者的政策选择，该规划者旨在最大化民主或其他政治体系中的福利，在这些体系中，从某种意义上说，福利旨在表达社会的福祉而非独裁者的个人偏好。当实际规划者面临具体的决策问题时，研究规划动机最为明确。福利经济学也试图阐明不存在实际规划者的非合作社会决策过程。研究者通常假设实际或假设的规划者足够了解选择环境，从而能够确定最优行动。然而，决策的后果往往高度不确定。解决研究未能正视不确定性的问题，推动了我对不确定性下可信社会规划的研究计划。本文描述了主要主题并总结了若干应用。我首先讨论了促进带有难以置信确定性的规划的做法，并用具体案例加以说明。接下来，我描述并对比了后果主义和公理决策理论中不确定性的概念。然后，我总结了对五个不确定性下规划问题的研究。

31455.title: The Rise in American Pain: The Importance of the Great Recession
31455.zh_title: 美国人疼痛感的上升：大衰退的重要性
31455.abstract: A significant literature has documented trend increases in pain among Americans over the last two or three decades. There is no single explanation seeming to work well for the increase. We show that, rather than resulting from a smooth upward trend, the increase was almost entirely concentrated in the 2007-2010 period, the time of the Great Recession, a result not uncovered in prior work. The disproportionate increase in pain among the less educated is also shown to have occurred primarily at the time of the Recession, with either little or no trend before or after. The Recession jump occurred only at older ages and, by cohort, primarily only at the ages when they experienced the Recession. However, the jump is difficult to explain, for while there was a temporary decline in employment during the Recession, it is unclear why there it should be followed by a permanent increase in pain. We assess a number of explanations related to family structure, the deterioration of family life, hysteresis, and biopsychosocial channels. While some factors have potential explanatory power, the rise in pain continues to be mysterious and deserves further research in light of our new findings.
31455.zh_abstract: 大量文献记录了在过去二三十年里美国人疼痛感的趋势性上升。对于这种上升，似乎没有单一的解释能很好地适用。我们表明，这种上升并非源于平滑的上升趋势，而是几乎完全集中在2007-2010年期间，即大衰退时期，这一结果在先前的研究中未被发现。教育程度较低者疼痛感的不成比例增加也主要发生在大衰退时期，之前或之后几乎没有趋势或没有趋势。大衰退期间的跃升仅发生在较年长的年龄段，并且按队列来看，主要仅在他们经历大衰退的年龄段。然而，这种跃升难以解释，因为尽管大衰退期间就业出现了暂时下降，但尚不清楚为何之后会伴随着疼痛感的永久性上升。我们评估了与家庭结构、家庭生活恶化、滞后效应以及生物心理社会渠道相关的若干解释。虽然某些因素具有潜在的解释力，但疼痛感的上升仍然是个谜，并且鉴于我们的新发现，值得进一步研究。

31454.title: The Model T
31454.authors: Shari Eli, Joshua K. Hausman, Paul Rhode
31454.abstract: We ask (1) why the United States adopted the car more quickly than other countries before 1929, and (2) why in the United States the car changed from a luxury to a mass market good between 1909 and 1919. We argue that the answer is in part the success of the Model T in the United States and its relative lack of success abroad. Mass production of the Model T began in 1913; by 1917, more than 40 percent of cars on the road were Model Ts. Cross-state and cross-county evidence suggest that the Model T opened up a new market for cars among farmers and in poorer areas of the country. Tariffs and difficulties producing outside Detroit made the U.S. success of the Model T difficult to replicate abroad, even in Canada.
31454.zh_abstract: 我们提出两个问题：（1）为什么美国在1929年之前比其他国家更快地采用了汽车；（2）为什么在美国，汽车在1909年至1919年间从奢侈品转变为大众市场商品。我们认为，答案部分在于T型车在美国的成功及其在国外的相对不成功。T型车的大规模生产始于1913年；到1917年，路上超过40%的汽车是T型车。跨州和跨县的证据表明，T型车为农民和该国较贫困地区的农民开辟了一个新的汽车市场。关税以及在底特律以外地区生产的困难使得T型车在美国的成功难以在国外复制，即使在加拿大也是如此。
31454.meta: Programs：DAE；JEL：N12, N32, N62, N7, N72, N92

31453.title: Everything in Moderation: Separating State Dependence from Unobserved Heterogeneity Between Alcohol and Employment
31453.zh_title: 适度饮酒：区分酒精与就业之间的状态依赖和不可观测异质性
31453.abstract: Previous literature presents mixed evidence on the effect of alcohol consumption on labor market outcomes. Due to limitations of available structural methods that model state dependence and unobserved heterogeneity, previous literature has not separately identified the causal pathways linking moderate versus heavy alcohol use to employment. This study develops a multiple-equation dynamic discrete choice ordered logit model, separately identifying the contribution of state dependence (within and between outcomes) and unobserved heterogeneity. Using this newly-developed methodology, this study finds that moderate alcohol use increases employment, indicating that policies that target alcohol consumption separately by dosage level may be beneficial to employment.
31453.zh_abstract: 先前文献关于酒精消费对劳动力市场结果的影响提供了混合的证据。由于现有建模状态依赖和不可观测异质性的结构方法存在局限性，先前文献未能分别识别中度饮酒与重度饮酒对就业的因果路径。本研究开发了一个多方程动态离散选择有序logit模型，分别识别了状态依赖（结果内部和结果之间）和不可观测异质性的贡献。使用这种新开发的方法，本研究发现中度饮酒增加了就业，表明按剂量水平分别针对酒精消费的政策可能对就业有益。

31452.title: Tax Losses and Ex-Ante Offshore Transfer of Intellectual Property
31452.zh_title: 税收损失与知识产权的事前离岸转移
31452.authors: Rishi Sharma, Joel Slemrod, Michael Stimmelmayr
31452.abstract: We develop a positive model of multinational firm behavior and analyze a firm’s incentive to transfer an intellectual property (IP) right of uncertain value offshore ex ante, i.e. before its success or failure is realized. Our analysis highlights two major aspects of this decision. First, an asymmetric treatment of project gains and losses in the home country creates an incentive to transfer IP to a foreign lowtax country to avoid potentially negative profits at home. These incentives exist even when IP is priced at a fair arms-length price and are further strengthened in the presence of R&D tax incentives. Second, when multinationals have private information about the probability of project success, they have an incentive to transfer their most promising IP ex ante.
31452.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个跨国公司行为的正向模型，并分析了公司事前（即在其成功或失败实现之前）将价值不确定的知识产权（IP）权利转移到离岸的激励。我们的分析突出了这一决策的两个主要方面。首先，母国对项目收益和损失的不对称处理产生了将知识产权转移到外国低税率国家以避免母国潜在负利润的激励。即使知识产权以公平的独立交易价格定价，这些激励也存在，并且在研发税收激励存在的情况下进一步加强。其次，当跨国公司拥有关于项目成功概率的私人信息时，它们有激励事前转移其最有前途的知识产权。

31451.title: Later-life Mortality and the Repeal of Federal Prohibition
31451.zh_title: 晚年死亡率与联邦禁酒令的废除
31451.authors: David S. Jacks, Krishna Pendakur, Hitoshi Shigeoka, Anthony Wray
31451.abstract: Despite a recent and dramatic re-evaluation of the health consequences of alcohol consumption, very little is known about the effects of in utero exposure to alcohol on long-run outcomes such as later-life mortality. Here, we investigate how state by year variation in alcohol control arising from the repeal of federal prohibition affects mortality for cohorts born in the 1930s. We find that individuals born in wet states experienced higher later-life mortality than individuals born in dry states, translating into a 3.3% increase in mortality rates between 1990 and 2004 for affected cohorts.
31451.zh_abstract: 尽管近期对酒精消费健康后果的评估发生了戏剧性的转变，但关于子宫内酒精暴露对晚年死亡率等长期结果的影响，我们所知甚少。在此，我们研究了因联邦禁酒令废除而产生的各州间酒精管控的逐年变化，如何影响1930年代出生队列的死亡率。我们发现，与出生在禁酒州的个体相比，出生在非禁酒州的个体经历了更高的晚年死亡率，这转化为受影响队列在1990年至2004年间死亡率上升了3.3%。
31451.meta: Programs：AG, DAE, EH, PE；JEL：H73, I18, J18, N32

31450.title: Caregiving and Labor Supply: New Evidence from Administrative Data
31450.zh_title: 照护与劳动力供给：来自行政数据的新证据
31450.authors: Nicole Maestas, Matt Messel, Yulya Truskinovsky
31450.abstract: A significant share of the rapidly growing demand for long-term care is met by family members, many of whom also work, and family caregiving has been shown to affect labor market outcomes. We use survey responses about family caregiving roles linked to administrative earnings records to estimate the employment trajectories of family caregivers over a 25 year period around the reported start of a caregiving episode. These trajectories vary significantly by gender. Relative to a matched comparison group, caregiving precipitates a drop in both earnings and employment for women, while men only enter caregiving after experiencing significant labor supply disruptions.
31450.zh_abstract: 快速增长的长照需求中有相当一部分由家庭成员满足，其中许多人同时也在工作，而家庭照护已被证明会影响劳动力市场结果。我们利用与行政收入记录相关联的关于家庭照护角色的调查回复，来估计家庭照护者在报告照护事件开始前后25年期间的就业轨迹。这些轨迹因性别而有显著差异。相对于匹配的对照组，照护导致女性收入和就业均下降，而男性则是在经历显著的劳动力供给中断后才开始承担照护责任。

31449.title: War and Science in Ukraine
31449.abstract: We discuss the impacts of the Russian invasion on Ukrainian science. Using newly collected data, we show that the war has already had significant effects on science in Ukraine: research papers produced by Ukrainian scientists declined by about 10%, approximately 5% of the most prolific scientists are publishing with a foreign affiliation, 22% of top universities have faced destruction of physical capital, and international collaborations with Russian scientists have declined by more than 40%. Drawing upon the economics of science and innovation literature, we highlight three primary channels through which wars impact science: (1) the loss of human capital, (2) the destruction of physical capital, and (3) reductions in international scientific cooperation. The evidence from the literature on the long-run effects of losing human or physical capital indicates that shocks to physical capital can be remedied more easily than shocks to human capital. Our new data also suggests that human capital shocks are the main drivers of the reduction in Ukrainian research output that has occurred since the beginning of the war. Hence, reconstruction efforts that focus on supporting scientists to continue in the research sector, and return to Ukraine after the war has ended, are likely to have the greatest impact on long-run scientific productivity in Ukraine.
31449.zh_abstract: 我们讨论了俄罗斯入侵对乌克兰科学的影响。利用新收集的数据，我们表明战争已经对乌克兰的科学产生了显著影响：乌克兰科学家产出的研究论文减少了约10%，大约5%的高产科学家以外国机构名义发表论文，22%的顶尖大学面临物质资本破坏，与俄罗斯科学家的国际合作减少了超过40%。借鉴科学经济学与创新文献，我们强调了战争影响科学的三个主要渠道：（1）人力资本的损失，（2）物质资本的破坏，以及（3）国际科学合作的减少。关于失去人力或物质资本长期影响的文献证据表明，物质资本冲击比人力资本冲击更容易补救。我们的新数据也表明，人力资本冲击是自战争开始以来乌克兰研究产出减少的主要驱动因素。因此，专注于支持科学家继续留在研究领域并在战争结束后返回乌克兰的重建努力，可能对乌克兰的长期科学生产力产生最大影响。

31448.title: The Age of Mass Migration in Argentina: Social Mobility, Effects on Growth, and Selection Patterns
31448.zh_title: 阿根廷的大规模移民时代：社会流动性、对增长的影响与选择模式
31448.authors: Federico Droller, Martin Fiszbein, Santiago Pérez
31448.abstract: Argentina was the second largest destination country during the Age of Mass Migration, receiving nearly six million migrants. In this article, we first summarize recent findings characterizing migrants’ long-term economic assimilation and their contributions to local economic development. The reviewed evidence shows that Europeans experienced rapid upward mobility in Argentina and immigration contributed positively to the process of economic development. We then turn our focus to the selection patterns of Italian migrants to Argentina—the largest migratory group to this destination. Our analysis of this initial stage of the migrants’ history shows that Italians who moved to Argentina were positively selected on the basis of literacy, complementing existing evidence of rapid upward mobility and contribution to growth at destination.
31448.zh_abstract: 在大规模移民时代，阿根廷是第二大目的地国家，接收了近六百万移民。在本文中，我们首先总结了描述移民长期经济同化及其对地方经济发展贡献的最新发现。回顾的证据表明，欧洲人在阿根廷经历了快速向上的流动性，且移民对经济发展过程做出了积极贡献。然后，我们将焦点转向意大利移民——这一目的地最大移民群体——的选择模式。我们对移民历史这一初始阶段的分析表明，移居阿根廷的意大利人在识字率方面是正向选择的，这补充了关于在目的地快速向上流动和对增长贡献的现有证据。

31499.title: Social Security Claiming Intentions: Psychological Ownership, Loss Aversion, and Information Displays
31499.zh_title: 社会保障申领意向：心理所有权、损失厌恶与信息展示
31499.abstract: For many Americans the question of when to claim Social Security benefits is one of the most consequential financial decisions they will ever face. While acknowledging that individuals differ in terms of optimal timing for starting Social Security benefits, many economists argue that an average person would benefit from delaying claiming as long as they could. Yet this is not what average Americans do. Many more Americans claim as soon as possible, at age 62, rather than as late as possible, at age 70. Why? This paper focuses on individual differences in beliefs and values that influence Social Security claiming intentions. As expected from economic theory, individual differences in life expectations and degree of patience for later larger payouts relate to claiming intentions. In addition, however, we also find that individual differences in psychological ownership of one’s Social Security benefits and individual differences in degree of loss aversion are both significant predictors of Social Security claiming intentions. Further, we find that an “enriched” information display manipulation (nudge) that emphasizes longer-term consequences of late claiming leads to earlier, not later, claiming intentions, and that the size of this effect is related to individual differences in the degree of loss aversion.
31499.zh_abstract: 对许多美国人而言，何时申领社会保障福利是他们面临的最重要的财务决策之一。尽管承认个人在开始领取社会保障福利的最佳时机上存在差异，但许多经济学家认为，普通人会从尽可能延迟申领中受益。然而，这并非普通美国人的实际行为。更多美国人选择尽早申领（62岁），而非尽可能晚地申领（70岁）。原因何在？本文聚焦于影响社会保障申领意向的个体信念和价值观差异。正如经济理论所预期，个体在预期寿命和对后期更高收益的耐心程度上的差异与申领意向相关。但此外，我们还发现，个体对自身社会保障福利的心理所有权差异以及损失厌恶程度差异，都是社会保障申领意向的重要预测因素。进一步地，我们发现，一种强调延迟申领长期后果的“丰富化”信息展示干预（助推）会导致更早而非更晚的申领意向，且该效应的大小与个体损失厌恶程度的差异相关。

31498.title: Selection-Neglect in the NFT Bubble
31498.abstract: Using transaction data from a large non-fungible token (NFT) trading platform, this paper examines how the behavioral bias of selection-neglect interacts with extrapolative beliefs, accelerating the boom and delaying the crash in the recent NFT bubble. We show that the price-volume relationship is consistent with extrapolative beliefs about increasing prices which were plausibly triggered by a macroeconomic shock. We test the hypothesis that agents prone to selection-neglect formed even more optimistic beliefs and traded more aggressively than their counterparts during the boom. When liquidity for NFTs declined, observed NFT prices were subject to severe selection bias due in part to seller loss aversion delaying the onset of the crash. Finally, we show that market participants with sophisticated bidding behavior were less subject to selection bias and performed better.
31498.zh_abstract: 本文利用来自大型非同质化代币（NFT）交易平台的交易数据，研究了选择忽视这一行为偏差如何与外推信念相互作用，从而在近期的NFT泡沫中加速繁荣并延迟崩溃。我们表明，价格-数量关系与对价格上涨的外推信念一致，而这些信念可能由宏观经济冲击触发。我们检验了以下假设：在繁荣期，倾向于选择忽视的个体比其对应方形成了更乐观的信念，并进行了更激进的交易。当NFT流动性下降时，观察到的NFT价格受到严重的选择偏差影响，部分原因是卖方的损失厌恶延迟了崩溃的启动。最后，我们表明，具有复杂竞价行为的市场参与者受选择偏差影响较小，且表现更好。
31498.meta: Programs：AP；JEL：G1, G12, G14, G4, G40, G41

31497.title: Were COVID and the Great Recession Well-being Reducing?
31497.zh_title: 大衰退和新冠疫情是否降低了幸福感？
31497.abstract: We show individuals’ reports of subjective well being in Europe did decline in the Great Recession and during the Covid pandemic on most measures and on four bordering countries to Ukraine after the Russian invasion in 2022. However, the movements are not large and are not apparent everywhere. We also used data from the European Commission's Business and Consumer Surveys on people’s expectations of life in general, their financial situation and the economic and employment situation in the country, all of which dropped markedly in the Great Recession and during Covid, but bounced back quickly, as did firms’ expectations of the economy and the labor market. Neither the UN’s Human Development Index (HDI) nor data used in the World Happiness Report from the Gallup World Poll shifted much in response to negative shocks. The HDI has been rising in the last decade or so reflecting overall improvements in economic and social wellbeing, captured in part by real earnings growth, although it fell slightly after 2020 as life expectancy dipped. This secular improvement is mirrored in life satisfaction which has been rising in the last decade. However, so too have negative affect in Europe and despair in the USA
31497.zh_abstract: 我们表明，在大衰退和新冠疫情期间，欧洲个体报告的主观幸福感在大多数指标上确实有所下降，并且在2022年俄罗斯入侵后，乌克兰四个邻国也是如此。然而，这些变化幅度不大，且并非在所有地方都明显。我们还使用了欧盟委员会商业与消费者调查中关于人们对总体生活、个人财务状况以及国家经济和就业状况预期的数据，这些数据在大衰退和新冠疫情期间均显著下降，但迅速反弹，企业对经济和劳动力市场的预期也是如此。无论是联合国人类发展指数（HDI），还是盖洛普世界民意调查中用于《世界幸福报告》的数据，对负面冲击的反应都不大。HDI在过去十年左右持续上升，反映了经济和社会福祉的总体改善，部分体现在实际收入增长上，尽管在2020年后因预期寿命下降而略有下滑。这种长期改善也反映在生活满意度上，后者在过去十年中持续上升。然而，欧洲的负面情绪和美国的绝望感也在上升。

31496.title: Pandemic, War, Inflation: Oil Markets at a Crossroads?
31496.zh_title: 疫情、战争、通胀：石油市场处于十字路口？
31496.abstract: The COVID-19 pandemic as well as the Russian invasion of Ukraine have had profound effects on the global energy landscape, with some of the longer-lasting effects still unfolding. This paper discusses how these events have reshaped the supply side of the global oil market by focusing on structural changes in each of the three main oil-producing countries. The demand side has responded to geopolitical developments by devising a set of policy tools to stabilize oil markets and counter inflationary pressures. In particular, the price cap policy was introduced to supplement the EU embargo on seaborne Russian oil exports, and record volumes of oil were released from government-controlled emergency stockpiles. The sources of oil price fluctuations associated with these events are also discussed, as is their role in the recent surge of inflation, with a particular focus on the heterogeneity in the pass-through of oil supply shocks within the Euro area.
31496.zh_abstract: 新冠疫情以及俄罗斯入侵乌克兰对全球能源格局产生了深远影响，其中一些较长期的影响仍在显现。本文通过聚焦三个主要产油国各自的结构性变化，讨论了这些事件如何重塑了全球石油市场的供给侧。需求侧则通过制定一系列政策工具来稳定石油市场并应对通胀压力，以回应地缘政治发展。特别是，引入了价格上限政策以补充欧盟对俄罗斯海运石油出口的禁运，并从政府控制的紧急储备中释放了创纪录数量的石油。本文还讨论了与这些事件相关的石油价格波动的来源，以及它们在近期通胀飙升中的作用，特别关注了欧元区内石油供给冲击传导的异质性。

31495.title: Conservation Priorities and Environmental Offsets: Markets for Florida Wetlands
31495.zh_title: 保护优先事项与环境补偿：佛罗里达湿地市场
31495.abstract: We introduce an empirical framework for valuing markets in environmental offsets. Using newly-collected data on wetland conservation and offsets, we apply this framework to evaluate a set of decentralized markets in Florida, where land developers purchase offsets from long-lived producers who restore wetlands over time. We find that offsets led to substantial private gains from trade, creating $\$2.4$ billion of net surplus from 1995–2020 relative to direct conservation. Offset trading also generated new hydrological externalities. A locally differentiated Pigouvian tax would have prevented $\$1.6$ billion of new flood damage while preserving more than two-thirds of the private gains from trade.
31495.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个评估环境补偿市场价值的实证框架。利用新收集的湿地保护和补偿数据，我们将该框架应用于评估佛罗里达州的一组分散化市场，在该市场中，土地开发商从长期运营的湿地恢复生产者那里购买补偿。我们发现，补偿带来了可观的私人交易收益，在1995年至2020年间相对于直接保护创造了24亿美元的净剩余。补偿交易也产生了新的水文外部性。一项地区差异化的庇古税本可以防止16亿美元的新增洪水损失，同时保留超过三分之二的私人交易收益。

31494.title: Remote Work and City Structure
31494.authors: Ferdinando Monte, Charly Porcher, Esteban Rossi-Hansberg
31494.abstract: Relative to remote work, working downtown facilitates valuable interactions with other in-office workers, but entails commuting costs. The resulting coordination mechanism can lead to multiple stationary equilibria with varying levels of remote work. Temporary reductions in commuters, as in the COVID-19 pandemic, can then lead to persistently large fractions of remote workers. Cell-phone-based mobility data for the U.S. shows that commuting trips in the largest cities, which are more likely to exhibit multiplicity, have stabilized at only 60% of pre-pandemic levels, while they are fully back in smaller cities. Cities with permanently low commuting experience average welfare losses of 2.3%.
31494.zh_abstract: 与远程工作相比，在市中心工作有利于与其他办公室员工进行有价值的互动，但需要承担通勤成本。由此产生的协调机制可能导致多个具有不同远程工作水平的稳定均衡。通勤者的暂时减少，例如在COVID-19大流行期间，可能导致远程工作者的比例持续居高不下。基于手机移动数据的美国数据显示，最有可能出现多重均衡的大城市的通勤出行量已稳定在大流行前水平的60%，而小城市的通勤出行量已完全恢复。通勤量永久性较低的城市平均福利损失为2.3%。
31494.meta: Programs：EFG, ITI；JEL：D24, J22, J23, J61, O33, R32

31493.title: To What Extent are Trends in Teen Mental Health Driven by Changes in Reporting? The Example of Suicide-Related Hospital Visits
31493.zh_title: 青少年心理健康趋势在多大程度上由报告变化驱动？以自杀相关医院就诊为例
31493.abstract: Rising reports of suicidal behaviors in children and adolescents have led to the recognition of a youth mental health crisis. However, reported rates can be influenced by access to screening and changes in reporting conventions, as well as by changes in social stigma. Using data on all hospital visits in New Jersey from 2008-2019, we investigate two inflection points in adolescent suicide-related visits and show that a rise in 2012 followed changes in screening recommendations, while a sharp rise in 2016-2017 followed changes in the coding of suicidal ideation. Rates of other suicidal behaviors including self-harm, attempted suicides, and completed suicides were essentially flat over this period. These results suggest that underlying suicide-related behaviors among children, while alarmingly high, may not have risen as sharply as reported rates suggest. Hence, researchers should approach reported trends cautiously.
31493.zh_abstract: 儿童和青少年自杀行为报告的增加导致人们认识到青少年心理健康危机。然而，报告率可能受到筛查可及性、报告惯例变化以及社会污名变化的影响。利用2008年至2019年新泽西州所有医院就诊数据，我们调查了青少年自杀相关就诊的两个拐点，并表明2012年的上升是筛查建议变化的结果，而2016-2017年的急剧上升则是自杀意念编码变化的结果。在此期间，包括自残、自杀未遂和自杀完成在内的其他自杀行为率基本持平。这些结果表明，儿童中潜在的自杀相关行为虽然高得惊人，但可能并未像报告率所显示的那样急剧上升。因此，研究人员应谨慎对待报告的趋势。

31492.title: Diversifying Society’s Leaders? The Determinants and Causal Effects of Admission to Highly Selective Private Colleges
31492.zh_title: 使社会领导者多元化？进入高选择性私立大学的决定因素与因果效应
31492.authors: Raj Chetty, David J. Deming, John N. Friedman
31492.abstract: We use anonymized admissions data from several colleges linked to income tax records and SAT and ACT test scores to study the determinants and causal effects of attending Ivy-Plus colleges (Ivy League, Stanford, MIT, Duke, and Chicago). Children from families in the top 1% are more than twice as likely to attend an Ivy-Plus college as those from middle-class families with comparable SAT/ACT scores. Two-thirds of this gap is due to higher admissions rates for students with comparable test scores from high-income families; the remaining third is due to differences in rates of application and matriculation. In contrast, children from high-income families have no admissions advantage at flagship public colleges. The high-income admissions advantage at Ivy-Plus colleges is driven by three factors: (1) preferences for children of alumni, (2) weight placed on non-academic credentials, and (3) athletic recruitment. Using a new research design that isolates idiosyncratic variation in admissions decisions for waitlisted applicants, we show that attending an Ivy-Plus college instead of the average flagship public college increases students’ chances of reaching the top 1% of the earnings distribution by 50%, nearly doubles their chances of attending an elite graduate school, and almost triples their chances of working at a prestigious firm. The three factors that give children from high-income families an admissions advantage are uncorrelated or negatively correlated with post-college outcomes, whereas academic credentials such as SAT/ACT scores are highly predictive of post-college success.
31492.zh_abstract: 我们利用来自多所大学的匿名招生数据，这些数据与所得税记录以及SAT和ACT考试成绩相关联，研究了进入常春藤Plus大学（常春藤盟校、斯坦福大学、麻省理工学院、杜克大学和芝加哥大学）的决定因素和因果效应。来自收入最高1%家庭的孩子进入常春藤Plus大学的可能性是SAT/ACT成绩相当的中产阶级家庭孩子的两倍多。这一差距的三分之二源于高收入家庭中考试成绩相当的学生享有更高的录取率；其余三分之一则源于申请率和入学率的差异。相比之下，来自高收入家庭的孩子在旗舰公立大学没有录取优势。常春藤Plus大学的高收入录取优势由三个因素驱动：（1）对校友子女的偏好；（2）对非学术资质的重视；（3）体育特长生招募。利用一种新的研究设计，该设计分离了候补名单申请人录取决定中的特质性变异，我们表明，就读常春藤Plus大学而非普通旗舰公立大学，使学生进入收入分布前1%的机会增加50%，进入精英研究生院的机会几乎翻倍，在知名公司工作的机会几乎增加两倍。使高收入家庭孩子获得录取优势的三个因素与大学毕业后结果不相关或负相关，而SAT/ACT考试成绩等学术资质则高度预测大学后的成功。

31491.title: Under the Same Umbrella: Public Health Insurance Expansions and the Uniformity of Insurance for Families
31491.zh_title: 同一把伞下：公共医疗保险扩展与家庭保险的统一性
31491.authors: Sarah Hamersma, Daniel S. Grossman, Sebastian Tello-Trillo
31491.abstract: Evaluating insurance coverage at the individual level abstracts away from the family-level decision making behind healthcare utilization. While traditional private insurance tends to be offered to either adult individuals or whole families, public insurance eligibility is determined person-by-person. Income eligibility thresholds for public coverage can differ for parents and children, and even among children in different age groups. Having different insurance sources, or a mix of insured and uninsured members of a family, may be disruptive to consistent medical care. In this paper we investigate how changes in eligibility thresholds for adults and children are associated with mismatched patterns of insurance coverage. Using the Current Population Survey and the Survey of Income and Program Participation, we document the patterns of insurance mismatch over time and their relationship to Medicaid and State Children’s Health Insurance Program income eligibility thresholds. We find that expansions of parent thresholds can promote uniform insurance coverage for families. These results are driven by families led by single mothers, who are more likely to be affected by Medicaid expansions for parents. Treating a family as the main unit of observation provides important insights and details potential unintended consequences of individual-level public insurance policy.
31491.zh_abstract: 在个人层面评估保险覆盖忽略了医疗保健利用背后的家庭层面决策。虽然传统私人保险倾向于提供给成年个人或整个家庭，但公共保险的资格是按人确定的。父母和子女的公共保险收入资格门槛可能不同，甚至不同年龄段的儿童之间也可能不同。拥有不同的保险来源，或家庭中既有参保又有未参保成员，可能会干扰持续的医疗保健。在本文中，我们研究了成人和儿童资格门槛的变化如何与保险覆盖的不匹配模式相关联。利用当前人口调查和收入与项目参与调查，我们记录了保险不匹配随时间变化的模式及其与医疗补助和州儿童健康保险计划收入资格门槛的关系。我们发现，提高父母门槛可以促进家庭的统一保险覆盖。这些结果由单亲母亲领导的家庭驱动，她们更可能受到针对父母的医疗补助扩展的影响。将家庭作为主要观察单位提供了重要的见解，并揭示了个人层面公共保险政策可能产生的意外后果。

31490.title: Discrimination in Multi-Phase Systems: Evidence from Child Protection
31490.zh_title: 多阶段系统中的歧视：来自儿童保护的证据
31490.authors: E. Jason Baron, Joseph J. Doyle Jr., Natalia Emanuel, Peter Hull, Joseph P. Ryan
31490.abstract: We develop empirical tools for studying discrimination in multi-phase systems, and apply them to the setting of foster care placement by child protective services. Leveraging the quasi-random assignment of two sets of decision-makers—initial hotline call screeners and subsequent investigators—we study how unwarranted racial disparities arise and propagate through this system. Using a sample of over 200,000 maltreatment allegations, we find that calls involving Black children are 55% more likely to result in foster care placement than calls involving white children with the same potential for future maltreatment in the home. Call screeners account for up to 19% of this unwarranted disparity, with the remainder due to investigators. Unwarranted disparity is concentrated in cases with potential for future maltreatment, suggesting that white children may be harmed by “under-placement” in high-risk situations.
31490.zh_abstract: 我们开发了用于研究多阶段系统中歧视的实证工具，并将其应用于儿童保护服务中的寄养安置环境。利用两组决策者——初始热线电话筛查员和后续调查员——的准随机分配，我们研究了无根据的种族差异如何产生并在该系统中传播。使用超过20万起虐待指控的样本，我们发现，涉及黑人儿童的举报导致寄养安置的可能性比涉及白人儿童且家庭未来虐待可能性相同的举报高出55%。热线筛查员占这种无根据差异的至多19%，其余部分由调查员造成。无根据的差异集中在存在未来虐待可能性的案件中，这表明白人儿童可能因在高风险情况下“安置不足”而受到伤害。
31490.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：C26, I31, J13, J15

31489.title: Housing, Household Debt, and the Business Cycle: An Application to China and Korea
31489.zh_title: 住房、家庭债务与经济周期：对中国和韩国的应用
31489.abstract: China and South Korea both experienced substantial increases in household debt through 2021, and now both countries face a weakening economy. This essay gleans lessons from the “credit-driven household demand channel” (e.g., Mian and Sufi 2018) to explore how the two economies will fare in the years ahead. On the positive side, neither country is at risk of a severe financial crisis, and both countries have a strong current account position. On the negative side, consumer spending in both countries could be quite weak in the years ahead. For China, the biggest risk is that distortions in the production sector aimed at boosting the property market were a major driver of growth during the boom, and it is unclear how growth can continue to be sustained with the property market stumbling.
31489.zh_abstract: 中国和韩国在2021年之前都经历了家庭债务的大幅增长，现在两国都面临经济疲软。本文从“信贷驱动的家庭需求渠道”（例如Mian和Sufi 2018）中汲取教训，探讨两国未来几年的经济表现。积极方面是，两国都没有发生严重金融危机的风险，并且都有强劲的经常账户头寸。消极方面是，两国的消费者支出在未来几年可能相当疲软。对中国而言，最大的风险在于，旨在提振房地产市场的生产部门扭曲是繁荣时期增长的主要驱动力，而在房地产市场步履蹒跚的情况下，如何继续维持增长尚不清楚。

31488.title: Exporting, Global Sourcing, and Multinational Activity: Theory and Evidence from the United States
31488.zh_title: 出口、全球采购与跨国活动：来自美国的理论与证据
31488.authors: Pol Antràs, Evgenii Fadeev, Teresa C. Fort, Felix Tintelnot
31488.abstract: Multinational firms (MNEs) dominate trade flows, yet their global production decisions are often ignored in firm-level studies of exporting and importing. Using newly merged data on US firms' trade and multinational activity by country, we show that MNEs are more likely to trade not only with countries in which they have affiliates, but also with other countries within their affiliates' region. We rationalize these patterns with a new source of firm-level scale economies that arises when country-specific fixed costs to source from, or sell in, a market are shared across all the MNE's plants. These shared fixed costs create interdependencies between a firm's production and trade locations that generate third-market responses to bilateral trade policy changes.
31488.zh_abstract: 跨国公司主导着贸易流动，然而在企业层面的出口和进口研究中，它们的全球生产决策常常被忽视。利用新合并的美国企业按国家划分的贸易和跨国活动数据，我们表明，跨国公司不仅更有可能与它们设有子公司的国家进行贸易，而且也更有可能与其子公司所在区域内的其他国家进行贸易。我们通过一种新的企业层面规模经济来源来解释这些模式，这种规模经济产生于当在一个市场采购或销售的国家特定固定成本由跨国公司的所有工厂共同承担时。这些共享的固定成本创造了企业生产和贸易地点之间的相互依赖关系，从而产生对双边贸易政策变化的第三市场反应。

31487.title: Innovation, Inventor Mobility, and the Enforceability of Noncompete Agreements
31487.authors: Matthew S. Johnson, Michael Lipsitz, Alison Pei
31487.abstract: Firms often restrict workers’ mobility with Noncompete Agreements (NCAs). Using state-level law changes, we find that making NCAs easier to enforce (“stricter” enforceability) leads to fewer patents, an effect that we show reflects a loss in innovation. While stricter enforceability encourages firms’ R&D investment, consistent with alleviating hold-up concerns, it also limits inventors’ job mobility and new business formation; supplementary evidence indicates the decline in mobility stifles knowledge diffusion. Analyses of technology-specific nationwide exposure, as well as cross-state spillovers via firms’ corporate networks, reveal that our state-level estimates, if anything, understate the economy-wide effects of NCA enforceability on innovation.

31486.title: More Unequal We Stand? Inequality Dynamics in the United States 1967–2021
31486.zh_title: 我们是否更加不平等？1967-2021年美国的不平等动态
31486.authors: Jonathan Heathcote, Fabrizio Perri, Giovanni L. Violante, Lichen Zhang
31486.abstract: Heathcote et al. (2010) conducted an empirical analysis of several dimensions of inequality in the United States over the years 1967-2006, using publicly-available survey data. This paper expands the analysis, and extends it to 2021. We find that since the early 2000s, the college wage premium has stopped growing, and the race wage gap has stalled. However, the gender wage gap has kept shrinking. Both individual- and household-level income inequality have continued to rise at the top, while the cyclical component of inequality dominates dynamics below the median. Inequality in consumption expenditures has remained remarkably stable over time. Income pooling within the family and redistribution by the government have enormous impacts on the dynamics of household-level inequality, with the role of the family diminishing and that of the government growing over time. In particular, largely due to generous government transfers, the COVID recession has been the first downturn in fifty years in which inequality in disposable income and consumption actually declined.
31486.zh_abstract: Heathcote等人（2010）利用公开可用的调查数据，对1967-2006年间美国不平等的多个维度进行了实证分析。本文扩展了该分析，并将其延伸至2021年。我们发现，自21世纪初以来，大学工资溢价已停止增长，种族工资差距也已停滞。然而，性别工资差距持续缩小。个人和家庭层面的收入不平等在顶端继续上升，而不平等的周期性成分主导了中位数以下的动态。消费支出不平等随时间推移保持显著稳定。家庭内部的收入汇集和政府的再分配对家庭层面不平等的动态产生了巨大影响，其中家庭的作用随时间减弱，而政府的作用增强。特别是，主要由于慷慨的政府转移支付，COVID衰退是五十年来第一次可支配收入和消费不平等实际下降的经济衰退。

31485.title: Tell Me Something I Don’t Already Know: Learning in Low and High-Inflation Settings
31485.authors: Michael Weber, Bernardo Candia, Hassan Afrouzi, Tiziano Ropele, Rodrigo Lluberas, Serafin Frache, Brent H. Meyer, Saten Kumar, Yuriy Gorodnichenko, Dimitris Georgarakos, Olivier Coibion, Geoff Kenny, Jorge Ponce
31485.abstract: Using randomized control trials (RCTs) applied over time in different countries, we study whether the economic environment affects how agents learn from new information. We show that as inflation rose in advanced economies, both households and firms became more attentive and informed about publicly available news about inflation, leading them to respond less to exogenously provided information about inflation and monetary policy. We also study the effects of RCTs in countries where inflation has been consistently high (Uruguay) and low (New Zealand) as well as what happens when the same agents are repeatedly provided information in both low- and high-inflation environments (Italy). Our results broadly support models in which inattention is an endogenous outcome that depends on the economic environment.

31484.title: Aggregate Lending and Modern Financial Intermediation: Why Bank Balance Sheet Models are Miscalibrated
31484.authors: Greg Buchak, Gregor Matvos, Tomasz Piskorski, Amit Seru
31484.abstract: Existing macroeconomic models focused on bank balance sheet lending are deficient because they do not account for the modern industrial organization of financial intermediation. Utilizing publicly available micro-level lending data, we investigate two increasingly significant margins of adjustment in credit markets: banks’ ability to sell loans and shadow bank activity. These adjustment margins are substantial and vary across time and regions with different incomes. We examine these margins in a parsimonious dynamic quantitative model featuring banks with balance sheet adjustment through loan sales and shadow banks. Using the calibrated model, we illustrate that these margins significantly dampen the immediate contraction following bank capital shock. Recovery is also faster, because profitable loan sales (e.g., securitization) allow banks to build capital faster and because shadow banks pick up lending slack. Failure to account for adjustment margins leads to significant errors when studying policies which rely on financial intermediation pass-through in the level of aggregate lending, its direction, and composition. Our model highlights the tension between bank balance sheet models and data. The model, which forces total lending to depend strongly on bank balance sheet health, must reconcile the weak correlation between bank capital and aggregate lending. These issues can be reconciled with now available data from bank balance sheets, overall bank lending, and aggregate lending, in conjunction with a model of modern financial intermediation.

31483.title: The Expansionary and Contractionary Supply-Side Effects of Health Insurance
31483.abstract: We examine how health insurance expansions influence the entry and location decisions of health care providers. While it is generally expected that reductions in consumer prices following insurance expansions will prompt supply-side growth to meet increased demand (Arrow, 1963), we demonstrate both theoretically and empirically that expansions of insurance with low, regulated provider reimbursements (e.g., Medicaid) can instead lead the supply side to contract. Additionally, we show that expansions of insurance with high, market-based prices (e.g., private coverage) can reduce acceptance of public coverage even as they drive growth in the overall concentration of providers.

31482.title: Minimum Tax Rates and Tax Competition: Evidence from Property Tax Limits in Finland
31482.zh_title: 最低税率与税收竞争：来自芬兰财产税上限的证据
31482.abstract: This paper analyzes how minimum local property tax rates affect local tax policy choice. In Finland, central government has raised the limits on property tax rates several times in the past 30 years. I construct a measure of forced tax rate increases caused by these reforms and examine how municipalities respond to forced increases in nearby municipalities. Results for the property tax on business properties indicate that neighbors' forced tax rate increases lead to higher tax rates, after a reform of the tax base equalization system which increased incentives to compete for the tax base. Before the equalization reform, the tax rates on business properties were unaffected by neighbors' forced tax rate increases. I find some indications that forced increases in the residential property tax rate lead to lower tax rates in neighboring municipalities four years later. Analysis of government bills shows that the introduction of minimum tax rates was partly motivated by concerns regarding horizontal and vertical tax competition. Forced property tax rate increases have a clear and lasting effect on tax revenue in affected municipalities, implying that the tax capacity of central government as regards other tax bases likely increased.
31482.zh_abstract: 本文分析了最低地方财产税率如何影响地方税收政策选择。在芬兰，中央政府在过去30年中多次提高了财产税税率下限。我构建了一个衡量这些改革所导致的强制性税率提高的指标，并考察了市政当局如何应对邻近市政当局的强制性税率提高。对商业财产税的结果表明，在税基均等化体系改革（该改革增加了争夺税基的激励）之后，邻近地区的强制性税率提高导致了更高的税率。在均等化改革之前，商业财产税率不受邻近地区强制性税率提高的影响。我发现一些迹象表明，住宅财产税的强制性提高会导致四年后邻近市政当局的税率降低。对政府法案的分析表明，引入最低税率的部分动机是出于对横向和纵向税收竞争的担忧。强制性的财产税税率提高对受影响市政当局的税收收入产生了明确且持久的影响，这意味着中央政府在其他税基上的税收能力可能有所增强。

31477.title: Entrepreneurship in China's Structural Transitions: Network Expansion and Overhang
31477.zh_title: 中国结构转型中的创业：网络扩张与过度依赖
31477.authors: Ruochen Dai, Dilip Mookherjee, Kaivan Munshi, Xiaobo Zhang
31477.abstract: This research examines the determinants of entrepreneurship in the initial transition from agriculture to industrial production and the subsequent transition to higher value exporting in China. Using data covering the universe of registered firms over the 1994-2009 period, we find that individuals born in rural counties with higher agricultural productivity and population density had a greater propensity to enter domestic production in the first transition, but that this association was reversed in the second transition to exporting. This is despite the fact that revenues (and productivity) were increasing more steeply over time for firms drawn from denser birth counties in both activities. The model that we develop to reconcile these facts incorporates a productivity enhancing role for hometown (birth county) networks. We provide causal evidence, using shift-share instruments, that these networks of firms were active and that more densely populated rural counties gave rise to networks that were more effective at increasing the revenues of their members, both in domestic production and exporting. While this generated faster transition in the first stage, the incumbent (more successful) domestic networks drawn from denser counties created a disincentive to subsequently enter exporting. Our analysis identifies a novel dynamic inefficiency that could arise in any developing economy where (overlapping) networks are active.
31477.zh_abstract: 本研究考察了在中国从农业向工业生产的最初转型以及随后向更高价值出口的转型中，创业的决定因素。利用覆盖1994-2009年期间所有注册企业的数据，我们发现，出生于农业生产力更高、人口密度更大的农村县的个体，在第一次转型中进入国内生产的倾向更高，但这种关联在第二次向出口转型时发生了逆转。尽管在这两种活动中，来自人口更密集出生县的企业，其收入（和生产率）随时间增长得更快。我们为调和这些事实而开发的模型，融入了家乡（出生县）网络对生产率的提升作用。我们利用份额转移工具提供了因果证据，表明这些企业网络是活跃的，并且人口更密集的农村县产生的网络在增加其成员的收入方面更有效，无论是在国内生产还是出口中。虽然这在第一阶段产生了更快的转型，但来自人口更密集县的、更成功的现有国内网络，为随后进入出口领域创造了抑制因素。我们的分析识别出一种新颖的动态低效率，这种低效率可能出现在任何存在（重叠）网络的活跃的发展中经济体中。

31476.title: Dollar Rivals
31476.abstract: Written on the 50th anniversary of floating exchange rates, this paper deals with possible alternatives to a unipolar dollar-based system. It considers (1) measures of international currency use; (2) potential challengers to the dollar; (3) network externalities; and (4) the plausibility of gold and digital currencies, as alternatives to regular currencies. On the one hand, network externalities operate in favor of the status quo: the dollar as the single leading international currency. On the other hand, the danger of abuse of exorbitant privilege – for example, by debasing the currency or repeated use of sanctions – operates in favor of challengers. A good guess is that the dollar will continue to lose market share slowly to others, but will remain in the lead.
31476.zh_abstract: 本文写于浮动汇率制度50周年之际，探讨了以美元为基础的单极体系的可能替代方案。本文考虑了：(1) 国际货币使用的衡量标准；(2) 美元的潜在挑战者；(3) 网络外部性；以及 (4) 黄金和数字货币作为常规货币替代品的可行性。一方面，网络外部性有利于维持现状：美元作为单一的主导国际货币。另一方面，滥用过高特权（例如，通过货币贬值或反复使用制裁）的危险则有利于挑战者。一个合理的猜测是，美元将继续缓慢地将市场份额让给其他货币，但仍将保持领先地位。
